paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent change from the prior close and a -31.77 percent change over a 20-session window. There have been 2 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView and "Fermi Inc.: Fermi Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from FinanzNachrichten.de, both of which announce the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date. The earnings call is scheduled to be hosted on August 13, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including a Schedule 13G and multiple 8-K forms, one of which discloses the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings.
